name: $200 Airline Fee Credit
description: Up to $200 in statement credits per calendar year for incidental airline fees (checked bags, seat upgrades, in-flight food/drinks) on one selected qualifying airline. Select your airline by Jan 31 each year.

name: $200 Hotel Credit
description: Up to $200 in statement credits per calendar year for prepaid bookings at Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection (minimum 2-night stay) through American Express Travel.

name: $20 Digital Entertainment Credit
description: Up to $20 per month in statement credits for eligible digital entertainment subscriptions including Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+, Peacock, The New York Times, The Wall Street Journal, and SiriusXM.

name: $12.95 Walmart+ Credit
description: Monthly statement credit covering the cost of a Walmart+ membership ($12.95/month plus applicable taxes). Must use the Amex Platinum to pay for Walmart+ directly.

name: $15 Uber Cash
description: Up to $15 in Uber Cash per month for Uber rides or Uber Eats orders in the US. December bonus brings that month to $35. Unused Uber Cash does not roll over. Must add card to Uber app.

name: $50 Saks Fifth Avenue Credit
description: Up to $50 in statement credits at Saks Fifth Avenue per semiannual period (Jan–Jun and Jul–Dec), totaling up to $100/year. Enrollment required through Amex benefits portal.

name: $300 Equinox Credit
description: Up to $300 per calendar year in statement credits for eligible Equinox memberships or Equinox+ digital fitness subscription. Enrollment required.

name: $189 CLEAR Plus Credit
description: Up to $189 per calendar year in statement credits for a CLEAR Plus membership, providing expedited biometric security screening at 50+ airports and venues. Credit applies automatically.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry application fee (valid 5 years) or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Available once every 4.5 years. Credit applies automatically when paid with card.

name: $50 Resy Dining Credit
description: Up to $50 in statement credits per semiannual period (Jan–Jun and Jul–Dec) for dining at restaurants that accept Resy reservations. Enrollment required through the Amex app.

name: Centurion Lounge Access
description: Complimentary access to American Express Centurion Lounges worldwide. Guest access ($50/guest) unless you spent $75,000+ in the prior calendar year, which restores complimentary access for up to 2 guests.

name: Priority Pass Select
description: Complimentary Priority Pass Select membership providing unlimited access to 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide. Enrollment required through the Amex benefits portal. Guest fees may apply.

name: Delta Sky Club Access
description: Up to 10 complimentary Delta Sky Club visits per year when flying on a same-day Delta flight. Visits above 10 cost $50 each. Unlimited access if you spend $75,000+ on the card in a calendar year.

name: Global Dining Access by Resy
description: Priority access to exclusive reservations, "notify me" feature at fully-booked restaurants, and invitations to curated dining experiences at top Resy restaurants worldwide.

name: Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite Status
description: Complimentary Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite status: 25% bonus points on stays, enhanced room upgrades when available, late checkout when available. Enrollment required.

name: Hilton Honors Gold Status
description: Complimentary Hilton Honors Gold status: 80% bonus points, complimentary breakfast or F&B credit at full-service hotels, space-available room upgrades, 5th night free on award stays. Enrollment required.

name: Hertz President's Circle Status
description: Complimentary Hertz President's Circle status: guaranteed car upgrades, priority counter service, and additional benefits at Hertz locations. Enrollment required through Amex benefits.

name: $300 Travel Credit
description: Up to $300 in statement credits per cardmember year for bookings made through Capital One Travel portal. Applies automatically to eligible travel purchases.

name: 10,000 Anniversary Miles
description: 10,000 bonus miles awarded each account anniversary, worth $100 toward travel. Miles are credited automatically and never expire while the account is open.

name: Priority Pass Select (Unlimited)
description: Complimentary unlimited Priority Pass Select membership for cardmember and authorized users. Access to 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide. Enrollment required through Capital One benefits portal.

name: Capital One Lounge Access
description: Unlimited complimentary access to Capital One Lounges (Dallas DFW, Denver DEN, Dulles IAD) for cardmember plus up to 2 guests per visit. Additional guests $45 each.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry application fee or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Available once every 4 years.

name: Hertz President's Circle Status
description: Complimentary Hertz President's Circle elite status: guaranteed upgrades, no blackout dates, and top-tier service. Enrollment required through Capital One.

name: Cell Phone Protection
description: Up to $800 per claim, $1,600 per year for cell phone theft or damage when you pay your monthly cell phone bill with your Venture X. $50 deductible per claim, max 2 claims per year.

name: $300 Annual Travel Credit
description: Up to $300 in statement credits per cardmember year for travel purchases. Automatically applies to airlines, hotels, car rentals, rideshare, trains, tolls, parking, and more.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry (every 4.5 years) or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Credit applies automatically when you pay with your card.

name: Priority Pass Select (Unlimited)
description: Complimentary unlimited Priority Pass Select membership. Access to 1,300+ airport lounges plus eligible airport restaurants. Cardmember plus 2 guests included. Enrollment required.

name: $5 Monthly DoorDash Credit
description: Up to $5 per month in DashPass credits for DoorDash orders. Requires active DashPass membership. Enrollment through Chase benefits portal.

name: $15 Monthly Instacart Credit
description: Up to $15 per month in Instacart credits plus complimentary Instacart+ membership. Must activate through Chase and add card to Instacart account.

name: $10 Monthly Lyft Credit
description: Up to $10 in Lyft credits each month when you pay with your Chase Sapphire Reserve. Plus earn 10x total points on Lyft rides.

name: $120 Peloton Credit
description: Up to $120 per year in statement credits for eligible Peloton App or All-Access Membership purchases. Credit applies automatically when paid with card.

name: Chase Dining Access
description: Access to Chase Dining powered by Tock: exclusive reservations, priority seating, culinary experiences, and chef's table events at top restaurants nationwide.

name: Chase Sapphire Lounge Access
description: Complimentary access to Chase Sapphire Lounges at select major airports (Boston BOS, Las Vegas LAS, Philadelphia PHL, New York LaGuardia LGA, Hong Kong HKG, and more). Cardmember plus 2 guests.

name: Hertz President's Circle Status
description: Complimentary Hertz President's Circle status: guaranteed car upgrades, expedited service, and additional perks at Hertz locations. Enrollment required through Chase.

name: Admirals Club Membership
description: Full Admirals Club membership for cardmember and immediate family (spouse/domestic partner and children under 18) or up to 2 guests per visit. Access to all Admirals Club and partner lounges worldwide.

name: First Checked Bag Free
description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same American Airlines reservation. Saves up to $35 per person each way.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $120 credit for Global Entry application fee (including processing fee) or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Available once every 4.5 years.

name: $10 Monthly In-Flight Wi-Fi Credit
description: Up to $10 per month in statement credits for American Airlines in-flight Wi-Fi purchases. Apply your card at checkout on the flight.

name: Priority Boarding & Check-In
description: Priority check-in, security (where available), and Group 4 boarding for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same American Airlines reservation.

name: 10,000 Elite Qualifying Miles Boost
description: Earn 10,000 Elite Qualifying Miles (EQMs) after spending $40,000 in a cardmember year — a boost toward AAdvantage Platinum, Platinum Pro, or Executive Platinum status.

name: 25% Savings on AA In-Flight Purchases
description: Receive a 25% statement credit when using your card for food, beverages, and Wi-Fi on American Airlines flights — effectively a 25% discount on all in-flight spend.

name: $300 Travel Credit
description: Up to $300 in statement credits per cardmember year for travel purchases including airlines, hotels, car rentals, and cruise lines booked through Citi Travel or directly.

name: Priority Pass Select (Unlimited)
description: Complimentary unlimited Priority Pass Select membership for cardmember and authorized users. Access to 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $120 in statement credits for Global Entry application fee or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Applies automatically when paid with card.

name: $100 Hotel Savings Benefit
description: Up to $100 discount on a hotel stay of 2+ nights when booked through Citi Travel. Can be used once per cardmember year.

name: $7 Monthly Dining Credit
description: Up to $7 per month ($84/year) in statement credits for eligible dining purchases at restaurants. Enrollment required through Citi benefits portal.

name: ThankYou Points Redemption Boost
description: Redeem ThankYou Points at 1.25 cents each toward travel, or transfer to 15+ airline and hotel partners. Earn 3x on air, hotels, and attractions; 3x on restaurants; 1x on all other purchases.

name: Companion Certificate
description: One companion certificate each cardmember year after renewal for a round-trip domestic main cabin, Comfort+, or First Class ticket on Delta. Taxes and fees from $22+ apply.

name: Delta Sky Club Access
description: Up to 15 complimentary Delta Sky Club visits per year when flying on a same-day Delta flight. Visits above 15 cost $50 each. Unlimited access if spending $75,000+ on the card in a calendar year.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 statement credit for Global Entry application fee or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Credit applies automatically when paid with card.

name: First Checked Bag Free
description: First checked bag free for cardmember and up to 8 companions on the same Delta reservation. Saves up to $35 per person each way.

name: $20 Monthly Resy Dining Credit
description: Up to $20 per month in statement credits for dining at restaurants that use Resy for reservations. Enrollment required through the Amex app.

name: $10 Monthly Rideshare Credit
description: Up to $10 per month in statement credits for U.S. rideshare purchases (Uber, Lyft, and other qualifying services). Enrollment required.

name: MQD Earn on Purchases
description: Earn Medallion Qualification Dollars (MQDs) on card spend: $1 MQD per $10 on Delta purchases, $1 MQD per $20 on all other purchases. Contributes toward Silver, Gold, Platinum, or Diamond Medallion status.

name: Priority Boarding & Check-In
description: Main Cabin 1 priority boarding on Delta flights plus access to the priority check-in lane when flying Delta.

name: $200 Airline Fee Credit
description: Up to $200 in airline fee credits per semiannual period (Jan–Jun and Jul–Dec), totaling up to $400/year. Select one qualifying airline per calendar year. Enrollment required.

name: $200 Hilton Resort Credit
description: Up to $200 in resort credits per quarter (totaling up to $800/year) at participating Hilton Resorts worldwide. Applies automatically to eligible resort charges including dining, spa, and activities.

name: $100 Hilton On-Property Credit
description: Up to $100 in property credits per stay when booking a minimum 2-night stay directly at a participating Hilton property via Hilton.com or the Hilton app.

name: Free Night Reward Certificate
description: One free night reward certificate each cardmember year redeemable at most Hilton properties. Additional free night at $30,000 in spending, and another at $60,000+.

name: Hilton Diamond Status
description: Complimentary Hilton Honors Diamond status while card is held: daily breakfast or F&B credit, room upgrades (suites when available), executive lounge access, 100% bonus points, 5th night free on award stays.

name: Priority Pass Select (Unlimited)
description: Complimentary unlimited Priority Pass Select membership for access to 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide. Enrollment required through Amex benefits portal.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Credit applies automatically when paid with card.

name: National Car Rental Executive Status
description: Complimentary National Car Rental Emerald Club Executive status, letting you choose any car from the Executive or Emerald Aisle selection. Enrollment required through Amex.

name: $25 Monthly Dining Credit
description: Up to $25 per month in statement credits for restaurant purchases worldwide. Credit applies automatically — up to $300/year total. Does not apply to fast food or in-hotel coffee shops.

name: Free Night Award Certificate
description: One free night award certificate each cardmember year for properties up to 85,000 Marriott Bonvoy points per night. Additional free night at $60,000 in annual spending.

name: Priority Pass Select (Unlimited)
description: Complimentary unlimited Priority Pass Select membership for access to 1,300+ airport lounges worldwide. Enrollment required through Amex benefits portal.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Credit applies automatically when paid with card.

name: Marriott Bonvoy Platinum Elite Status
description: Complimentary Marriott Bonvoy Platinum Elite status: lounge access or welcome amenity, room upgrades when available, 4pm late checkout, enhanced Wi-Fi, and 50% bonus points on stays.

name: $100 Marriott On-Property Credit
description: Up to $100 in property credits per stay for dining, spa, or resort fees when booking a minimum 2-night stay directly at participating Marriott Bonvoy properties.

name: Hertz President's Circle Status
description: Complimentary Hertz President's Circle status: guaranteed upgrades, priority service, and additional Hertz benefits. Enrollment required through Amex.

name: United Club Membership
description: Full United Club membership for cardmember and immediate family (spouse/domestic partner and children under 21) or up to 2 adult guests traveling with the cardmember. Includes Star Alliance partner lounge access.

name: First & Second Checked Bag Free
description: First and second checked bags free for cardmember and one companion on the same reservation when flying United. Saves up to $70 per person round-trip.

name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Credit
description: Up to $100 application fee credit for Global Entry or up to $85 for TSA PreCheck. Credit applies automatically when paid with card.

name: Premier Access & Upgrades
description: Priority check-in, security screening, boarding, and baggage handling on United-operated flights. Plus complimentary Premier Upgrades on award tickets when available.

name: 25% Back on United In-Flight Purchases
description: Receive 25% back as a statement credit on United in-flight purchases (food, beverages, Wi-Fi) when paid with your United Club card.

name: Premier Qualifying Points Boost
description: Earn 25 Premier Qualifying Points (PQPs) per $500 spent on purchases, up to 1,000 PQPs per year toward United MileagePlus Silver, Gold, Platinum, or 1K elite status.

name: Hertz President's Circle Status
description: Complimentary Hertz President's Circle elite status: guaranteed upgrades, priority counter service, and additional perks at Hertz locations worldwide. Enrollment required through Chase.
